name: The Grid
description: Multi-agent operating system. Agents are specialized roles (receptionist, scheduler, auditor, social, etc.) that share a workspace, tools, and the same tenant context. The Grid is interoperable via the A2A protocol.

bearer.description: Tenant-scoped bearer token. Issued via https://gridfleet.ai/signup.html

skills.name: Phone & SMS Receptionist
skills.description: Answers inbound calls, gathers intent, books, escalates per business rules.
examples: Schedule a haircut for Tuesday at 2
Tell the caller we are closed and to text us
Take a message and notify the owner

skills.name: Knowledge-Grounded Q&A
skills.description: Answers from the tenant's ingested knowledge (website, PDFs, GBP). Cites sources.

skills.name: SMS + Email Delivery
skills.description: TCPA/CASL-compliant outbound messaging. Stop-words honored. Per-tenant from-number.

publicAgents.name: Vera
publicAgents.tagline: Receptionist that learns your business in 5 minutes — answers calls, books, escalates.
